sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ مَعًا لِتَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِ الشَّرِكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici rade zajedno kako bi ostvarili ciljeve kompanije.
sentences.translationEn: The employees work together to achieve the company's goals.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ الْجَمِيعُ فِي تَبَادُلِ الْأَفْكَارِ وَالْخِبْرَاتِ الْمُفِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi sarađuju u razmjeni korisnih ideja i iskustava.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone cooperates in exchanging useful ideas and experiences.

sentences.arabic: الِاحْتِرَامُ الْمُتَبَادَلُ هُوَ أَسَاسُ النَّجَاحِ فِي أَيِّ فَرِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Uzajamno poštovanje je osnova uspjeha u bilo kojem timu.
sentences.translationEn: Mutual respect is the foundation of success in any team.
